title: damnacanthus macrophyllus var. giganteus
intro: Damnacanthus macrophyllus var. giganteus, also known as the giant damnacanthus or giant dandelion, is a large, herbaceous plant native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits, including its ability to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Damnacanthus macrophyllus var. giganteus is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for medicinal use, with the leaves and stems being used to make herbal preparations.
